General.Name: Solomon Systech International Ltd
General.Description: Solomon Systech (International) Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a fabless semiconductor company in Hong Kong, Mainland China, Taiwan, Europe, Japan, Korea, Southeast Asia, the United States, and internationally. The company primarily designs, develops, and sells display integrated circuits (IC) products and system solutions. It also offers bistable displays; mobile display IC solutions, including in-cell touch display driver IC, TFT display driver IC, STN display driver IC, MIPI bridge IC, display controller IC, LCD touch controller IC, hi-speed interface IC and Local Dimming MiniLED backlight product; and organic light emitting diode (OLED) display products that include passive matrix OLED driver controllers for small size mobile display applications. In addition, the company provides large display driver IC solutions, such as source drivers, gate drivers, a GIP controller, and power IC; automotive display IC products; and custom ICs for digital, analog, and mixed-signal applications. Its products enable a range of display and touch applications for smartphones; tablets; TVs/monitors; notebooks; and other smart devices, including wearables, electronic shelf labels, healthcare devices, and smart home devices, as well as industrial appliances. Solomon Systech (International) Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Sha Tin, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Wireless Centre, Sha Tin, Hong Kong
